entry.title: IDC W15P7T04DA003 (P00026) awarded to ONAN CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: W6QK ACC-APG CONT CT WASH OFC

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE CONTRACT ACTION RESULTS IN A CHANGE TO THE PROCURING CONTRACTING OFFICER, INCORPORATING THE TECHNICAL DATA PACKAGE LIST (TDPL) AND CONSIDERATION FOR FIELDING SUPPORT SERVICES FOR THE ADVANCED MEDIUM MOBILE POWER SOURCES (AMMPS) GENERATOR SETS, POWER PLANTS, AND POWER UNITS INTO THE CONTRACT IN SUPPORT OF THE PROJECT MANAGER FOR MOBILE ELECTRONIC POWER (PM MEP).
